title: UK Exchange newsletter: English football — in a league of its own?
summary_full: English football appears to be riding high following Arsenal's Premier League win. But scratch beneath the surface and all is not as good as it looks.
summary_public: English football appears to be riding high following Arsenal's Premier League win. But scratch beneath the surface and all is not as good as it looks.
